Our Programmes

Two destinations.
One turnkey model.

Offer your students a choice. Both programs use the same AI & STEM curriculum — different cities, different cultural experiences.

Nature + Tech
📍 Chiang Mai, Thailand
AI & STEM Chiang Mai
Hosted at Wichai Wittaya School. Includes Elephant Sanctuary, Night Bazaar, and international buddy sessions with Thai students.
$695 USD / student
FD871 · HAN→CNX Nonstop · 1h 40m 5 flights/week
✦ Premium
📍 Bangkok, Thailand
AI & STEM Bangkok
Hosted at Chindamanee School. Includes Wat Arun, Chao Phraya dinner cruise, NSCI Science Museum, and Bangkok city landmarks.
$895 USD / student
VN/PG · HAN→BKK Nonstop · 2h Departs 12:45 PM

Program Timeline

7 days. Fully structured.

Every day is planned — STEM learning, cultural excursions, and evening activities. Zero administrative work for your team.

Day 1
Arrival
  • Afternoon flight departure
  • Airport welcome & transfer
  • Hotel check-in
  • Welcome dinner
Day 2
AI Pitch
  • English & AI pitch lessons
  • Elephant Sanctuary*
  • Night Bazaar walk
Day 3
Vlogging
  • AI Vlogging lessons
  • International Buddy session
  • Orphanage Masterclass*
Day 4
Vlogging+
  • Vlogging continuation
  • Afternoon study trip
  • Evening with mentors
Day 5
Arduino
  • English & Arduino
  • Afternoon study trip
  • Evening with mentors
Day 6
Arduino+
  • Final prototype build
  • Afternoon study trip
  • Evening with mentors
Day 7
Graduation
  • Graduation ceremony
  • Co-branded certificates
  • Airport send-off

* Chiang Mai excursions shown. Bangkok program includes Wat Arun, Chao Phraya dinner cruise, and science centers.

3 Skill Tracks

What students build

Every student leaves with three portfolio-ready outputs. Taught in English by certified educators.

🚀
AI Start-Up Pitch
Entrepreneurship
  • Identify a real-world problem worth solving
  • Design an AI-powered business solution
  • Build a compelling pitch deck
  • Live investor Q&A presentation
🎬
AI Vlogging
Content Creation
  • Scriptwriting & storyboarding
  • Smartphone cinematography
  • AI-assisted video editing
  • Publish a finished travel vlog
🔌
Arduino STEM
Engineering
  • Hardware, sensors & circuits
  • Block-based and text coding
  • Build a physical working prototype
  • Demo Day presentation to peers
Partner Benefits

What your school gets

Become a premium international program provider without the operational overhead. We handle everything on the ground.

01
Turnkey Operations
We manage 100% of ground logistics — accommodation, all meals, transport, curriculum delivery, and venue coordination. Zero admin burden for your team.
02
Free Chaperone Travel
One teacher or staff member travels free on-the-ground for every 15-student cohort — a powerful staff retention and team reward tool.
03
Co-Branded Credentials
Co-branded certificates, promotional materials, and professional event photography to elevate your center's international program reputation.
04
Full Halal Compliance
All meals throughout both programs are fully Halal-certified, ensuring complete comfort and confidence for Muslim students and their families.
05
Flexible Scheduling
Programs align with Vietnamese school holidays. Dates scheduled entirely around your demand — March–April and June–July windows available.
06
24/7 On-Ground Support
Emergency contingency fund, 24/7 on-ground support team, and comprehensive group travel insurance coordination — all included in the program fee.
Ground Logistics

Everything handled.

From airport pickup to graduation send-off — every aspect of the on-ground experience is fully managed.

✈️
Direct Flights
Nonstop flights from Hanoi to both destinations. Afternoon departures — no early mornings, no layovers. Comfortable for student groups.
🏨
Accommodation
3–4 star hotel for 6 nights. Twin, triple & single room configurations. All included in the program fee.
🚌
Private Transport
Private chartered bus for the full ground program, including airport pickup, all excursions, and graduation day drop-off.
🍽️
Halal Meals
3 Halal-certified meals per day plus drinking water for all participants. No exceptions, no substitutions needed.
🏫
Host Schools
Wichai Wittaya School (Chiang Mai) and Chindamanee School (Bangkok) — classrooms, equipment, and certified Thai educators.
🎓
Graduation Ceremony
Official Day 7 ceremony with co-branded certificates, professional photography, and a warm school community send-off.
